title: .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.9.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.9]
- Disable bootstrap
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.8]
- Drop netstandard-targeting-pack-2.1
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.7]
- Update to .NET 10 Preview 7
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.6]
- Rebuild to try and get rid of random errors
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.5]
- Initial commit on c10s
- Resolves: RHEL-98678
full_text:
[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.9.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.9]
- Disable bootstrap
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.8]
- Drop netstandard-targeting-pack-2.1
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.7.25380.108-0.7]
- Update to .NET 10 Preview 7
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.6]
- Rebuild to try and get rid of random errors
- Related: RHEL-98678

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.5]
- Initial commit on c10s
- Resolves: RHEL-98678
